definitions.text: Pertaining only to a part of something; partial.

examples: I couldn't find the particular model you asked for, but I hope this one will do.
We knew it was named after John Smith, but nobody knows which particular John Smith.

definitions.text: Specialised; characteristic of a specific person or thing.
examples: I don't appreciate your particular brand of cynicism.

definitions.text: A small individual part of something larger; a detail, a point. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
A particular case; an individual thing as opposed to a whole class. (Opposed to generals, universals.)
